summary: Backend regression tests after refactoring server.py from 4356 to 989 lines. All 42 tests passed. Tested all critical endpoints: Auth (login with all PINs), Tables/Areas, Orders (CRUD + send to kitchen), Kitchen view, Billing (payment methods, bills, payments, taxes), Products/Categories, Customers/Loyalty, Shifts, Reservations, Config, and Void Audit Logs.
passed_tests: TestAuth::test_login_kitchen_pin - Kitchen PIN 9999 login works (Chef Pedro)
TestTables::test_list_tables_by_area - Table filtering by area works
TestOrders::test_create_order - Create order on table works
TestOrders::test_add_items_to_order - Add items to order works
TestOrders::test_send_order_to_kitchen - Send order to kitchen works
TestBilling::test_create_bill - Create bill from order works (NCF generated)
critical_code_review_comments: All routers are properly structured with db injection pattern (set_db function)
Auth router correctly imports from models/database.py for db access
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id from responses ({"_id": 0})
Proper async/await usage throughout all routers
NCF (fiscal number) generation working correctly in billing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from production app
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working correctly after refactoring from monolithic server.py (4356 lines) to modular routers (989 lines). Routers: auth.py, orders.py, tables.py, billing.py, kitchen.py, customers.py, config.py. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_pos_regression.py covers all critical flows: login, areas/tables, orders+kitchen, billing, products, customers, shifts, reservations. PINs: Admin=0000, Waiter(Carlos)=1234, Cashier(Luis)=4321, Kitchen(Chef Pedro)=9999.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Resend API - mocked (no API key configured for sending)
mocked_apis.printing: Screen preview only - hardware printing mocked

routers_verified: routers/orders.py - Orders CRUD, add items, send kitchen, void audit logs
routers/billing.py - Bills, payments, payment methods, taxes, sale types
routers/config.py - Shifts, reservations, cancellation reasons, system config
